revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{神社 |名称 = 三島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=|coord={{coord|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]二條933-1 |位置 = {{coord|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[玉櫛媛|溝杙姫命]] |社…」
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 三島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=|coord={{coord|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]二條933-1 |位置 = {{coord|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[玉櫛媛|溝杙姫命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=三島神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 南伊豆町の中心部である加納地区の北方、町立図書館の北隣りの二條地区の飛び地に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''加毛神社'''（かもじんじゃ）の二座中の一座に比定され、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 加茂の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
[[明治]]6年（[[1873年]]）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。
== 祭神 == * [[玉櫛媛|溝杙姫命]]
== 境内 == * [[クスノキ]]（夫婦楠） - 県指定天然記念物<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - 南伊豆町観光協会</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - 静岡県</ref>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや みなみいすちようにしよう}} [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:南伊豆町の歴史]] [[Category:南伊豆町の建築物]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]

{{Infobox religious building | name = Mishima Shrine (Minamiizu-chō Nijō) | native_name = 三島神社 (南伊豆町二條) | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Mishima Shrine (Minamiizu-chō Nijō) | coordinates = {{coord|34.655306|138.856194}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Minamiizu-chō Nijō)'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町二條)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Minamiizu-chō Nijō)'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町二條)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Minamiizu-chō Nijō)'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町二條)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Minamiizu-chō Nijō)'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町二條)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Minamiizu-chō Nijō)'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町二條)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Minamiizu-chō Nijō)'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町二條)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Minamiizu-chō Nijō)'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町二條)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Minamiizu-chō Nijō)'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町二條)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

revision.comment: 1 revision imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 三島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=|coord={{coord|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]二條933-1 |位置 = {{coord|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[玉櫛媛|溝杙姫命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=三島神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 南伊豆町の中心部である加納地区の北方、町立図書館の北隣りの二條地区の飛び地に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''加毛神社'''（かもじんじゃ）の二座中の一座に比定され、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 加茂の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
[[明治]]6年（[[1873年]]）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。
== 祭神 == * [[玉櫛媛|溝杙姫命]]
== 境内 == * [[クスノキ]]（夫婦楠） - 県指定天然記念物<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - 南伊豆町観光協会</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - 静岡県</ref>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや みなみいすちようにしよう}} [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:南伊豆町の歴史]] [[Category:南伊豆町の建築物]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Minamiizu-chō Nijō)'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町二條)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{translated page|ja|三島神社 (南伊豆町二條)|version=103520759|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]]
== Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 三島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=|coord={{coord|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]二條933-1 |位置 = {{coord|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[玉櫛媛|溝杙姫命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=三島神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 南伊豆町の中心部である加納地区の北方、町立図書館の北隣りの二條地区の飛び地に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''加毛神社'''（かもじんじゃ）の二座中の一座に比定され、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 加茂の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
[[明治]]6年（[[1873年]]）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。
== 祭神 == * [[玉櫛媛|溝杙姫命]]
== 境内 == * [[クスノキ]]（夫婦楠） - 県指定天然記念物<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - 南伊豆町観光協会</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - 静岡県</ref>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁

==End Japanese==

[[JA:三島神社 (南伊豆町二條)]]
{{wikidata link|Q134927876}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]
{{translated page|ja|三島神社 (南伊豆町二條)|version=103520759|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]]
== Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 三島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=|coord={{coord|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]二條933-1 |位置 = {{coord|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[玉櫛媛|溝杙姫命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=三島神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 南伊豆町の中心部である加納地区の北方、町立図書館の北隣りの二條地区の飛び地に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''加毛神社'''（かもじんじゃ）の二座中の一座に比定され、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 加茂の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
[[明治]]6年（[[1873年]]）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。
== 祭神 == * [[玉櫛媛|溝杙姫命]]
== 境内 == * [[クスノキ]]（夫婦楠） - 県指定天然記念物<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - 南伊豆町観光協会</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - 静岡県</ref>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁
==End Japanese== [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:南伊豆町の歴史]] [[Category:南伊豆町の建築物]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]

== Japanese Wikipedia content ==
{{神社
|名称   = 三島神社
|画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=|coord={{coord|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E}}}}
|所在地 = {{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}二條933-1
|位置   = {{coord|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}
|祭神   = {{jalink|玉櫛媛|Q11572681|溝杙姫命}}
|社格   = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|村社}}
|創建   = 
|本殿   = 
|別名   = 
|札所等 = 
|例祭   = 11月2日
|神事   = 
|地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=三島神社|coordinates=
{{coord2|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
}}
'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

== 概要 ==
南伊豆町の中心部である加納地区の北方、町立図書館の北隣りの二條地区の飛び地に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''加毛神社'''（かもじんじゃ）の二座中の一座に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 加茂の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

== 祭神 ==
* {{jalink|玉櫛媛|Q11572681|溝杙姫命}}

== 境内 ==
* {{jalink|クスノキ|Q158722}}（夫婦楠） - 県指定天然記念物<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - 南伊豆町観光協会</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - 静岡県</ref>。

== 脚注 ==

== 外部リンク ==

==End Japanese==

'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の中心部である加納地区の北方、町立図書館の北隣りの二條地区の飛び地に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''加毛神社'''（かもじんじゃ）の二座中の一座に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 加茂の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|玉櫛媛|Q11572681|溝杙姫命}}

=== 境内 ===
* {{jalink|クスノキ|Q158722}}（夫婦楠） - 県指定天然記念物<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - 南伊豆町観光協会</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - 静岡県</ref>。

=== 脚注 ===
{{Reflist}}

=== 外部リンク ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁

{{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや みなみいすちようにしよう}}

'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の中心部である加納地区の北方、町立図書館の北隣りの二條地区の飛び地に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''加毛神社'''（かもじんじゃ）の二座中の一座に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 加茂の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|玉櫛媛|Q11572681|溝杙姫命}}

=== 境内 ===
* {{jalink|クスノキ|Q158722}}（夫婦楠） - 県指定天然記念物<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - 南伊豆町観光協会</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - 静岡県</ref>。

=== 脚注 ===
{{Reflist}}

=== 外部リンク ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁

== Japanese content ==

'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の中心部である加納地区の北方、町立図書館の北隣りの二條地区の飛び地に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''加毛神社'''（かもじんじゃ）の二座中の一座に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 加茂の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|玉櫛媛|Q11572681|溝杙姫命}}

=== 境内 ===
* {{jalink|クスノキ|Q158722}}（夫婦楠） - 県指定天然記念物<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - 南伊豆町観光協会</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - 静岡県</ref>。

=== 脚注 ===

'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の中心部である加納地区の北方、町立図書館の北隣りの二條地区の飛び地に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''加毛神社'''（かもじんじゃ）の二座中の一座に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 加茂の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|玉櫛媛|Q11572681|溝杙姫命}}

=== 境内 ===
* {{jalink|クスノキ|Q158722}}（夫婦楠） - 県指定天然記念物<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - 南伊豆町観光協会</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - 静岡県</ref>。

=== 脚注 ===

{{coord2|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
}}
'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in an exclave of the Nijō district, just north of the town library, north of the Kamo district that forms the center of Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified as one of the two seats of '''Kamo Shrine''' (かもじんじゃ), a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, and is also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Kamo no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{jalink|1873|Q7757}} (Meiji 6), it was listed as a village shrine<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Tamakushihime|Q11572681|Mizokui-hime-no-Mikoto}}

=== Precincts ===
* {{jalink|Camphor tree|Q158722}} (Meoto-gusu) - prefectural designated natural monument<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - Minamiizu Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.

=== Notes ===

=== External links ===

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in an exclave of the Nijō district, just north of the town library, north of the Kamo district that forms the center of Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified as one of the two seats of '''Kamo Shrine''' (かもじんじゃ), a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, and is also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Kamo no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{jalink|1873|Q7757}} (Meiji 6), it was listed as a village shrine<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Tamakushihime|Q11572681|Mizokui-hime-no-Mikoto}}

=== Precincts ===
* {{jalink|Camphor tree|Q158722}} (Meoto-gusu) - prefectural designated natural monument<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - Minamiizu Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in an exclave of the Nijō district, just north of the town library, north of the Kamo district that forms the center of Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified as one of the two seats of '''Kamo Shrine''' (かもじんじゃ), a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, and is also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Kamo no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{jalink|1873|Q7757}} (Meiji 6), it was listed as a village shrine<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Tamakushihime|Q11572681|Mizokui-hime-no-Mikoto}}

=== Precincts ===
* {{jalink|Camphor tree|Q158722}} (Meoto-gusu) - prefectural designated natural monument<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - Minamiizu Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office

{{coord2|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
}}
'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in an exclave of the Nijō district, just north of the town library, north of the Kamo district that forms the center of Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified as one of the two seats of '''Kamo Shrine''' (かもじんじゃ), a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, and is also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Kamo no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{jalink|1873|Q7757}} (Meiji 6), it was listed as a village shrine<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Tamakushihime|Q11572681|Mizokui-hime-no-Mikoto}}

=== Precincts ===
* {{jalink|Camphor tree|Q158722}} (Meoto-gusu) - prefectural designated natural monument<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - Minamiizu Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office

{{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや みなみいすちようにしよう}}

{{wikidata link|Q134927876}}

== Japanese content ==
{{神社
|名称   = Mishima Shrine
|画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=|coord={{coord|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E}}}}
|所在地 = {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}{{jalink|Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511}}{{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}} Nijō 933-1
|位置   = {{coord|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}
|祭神   = {{jalink|Tamakushihime|Q11572681|Mizokui-hime-no-Mikoto}}
|社格   = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}
|創建   = 
|本殿   = 
|別名   = 
|札所等 = 
|例祭   = November 2
|神事   = 
|地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Mishima Shrine|coordinates=
{{coord2|34|39|19.1|N|138|51|22.3|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
}}
'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in an exclave of the Nijō district, just north of the town library, north of the Kamo district that forms the center of Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified as one of the two seats of '''Kamo Shrine''' (かもじんじゃ), a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, and is also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Kamo no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{jalink|1873|Q7757}} (Meiji 6), it was listed as a village shrine<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Tamakushihime|Q11572681|Mizokui-hime-no-Mikoto}}

=== Precincts ===
* {{jalink|Camphor tree|Q158722}} (Meoto-gusu) - prefectural designated natural monument<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - Minamiizu Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office

{{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや みなみいすちようにしよう}}

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in an exclave of the Nijō district, just north of the town library, north of the Kamo district that forms the center of Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified as one of the two seats of '''Kamo Shrine''' (かもじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}}, and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Kamo no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757}} (Meiji 6), it was listed as a village shrine<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|lt=Tamakushihime|Q11572681|WD=Q11572681|lt=Mizokui-hime-no-Mikoto}}

=== Precincts ===
* {{ill|lt=Camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722}} (Meoto-gusu) - prefectural designated natural monument<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - Minamiizu Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.

=== Notes ===

=== External links ===

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in an exclave of the Nijō district, just north of the town library, north of the Kamo district that forms the center of Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified as one of the two seats of '''Kamo Shrine''' (かもじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}, and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Kamo no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757}} (Meiji 6), it was listed as a village shrine<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|lt=Tamakushihime|Q11572681|WD=Q11572681|lt=Mizokui-hime-no-Mikoto}}

=== Precincts ===
* {{ill|lt=Camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722}} (Meoto-gusu) - prefectural designated natural monument<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - Minamiizu Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in an exclave of the Nijō district, just north of the town library, north of the Kamo district that forms the center of Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified as one of the two seats of '''Kamo Shrine''' (かもじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Kamo no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was listed as a village shrine<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|lt=Tamakushihime|Q11572681|WD=Q11572681|lt=Mizokui-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Tamakushi-hime}}

=== Precincts ===
* {{ill|lt=Camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (Meoto-gusu) - prefectural designated natural monument<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - Minamiizu Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.

=== Notes ===

=== External links ===

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in an exclave of the Nijō district, just north of the town library, north of the Kamo district that forms the center of Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified as one of the two seats of '''Kamo Shrine''' (かもじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Kamo no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was listed as a village shrine<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|lt=Tamakushihime|Q11572681|WD=Q11572681|lt=Mizokui-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Tamakushi-hime}}

=== Precincts ===
* {{ill|lt=Camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (Meoto-gusu) - prefectural designated natural monument<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - Minamiizu Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in an exclave of the Nijō district, just north of the town library, north of the Kamo district that forms the center of Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified as one of the two seats of '''Kamo Shrine''' (かもじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Kamo no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was listed as a village shrine<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|lt=Tamakushihime|Q11572681|WD=Q11572681|lt=Mizokui-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Tamakushi-hime}}

=== Precincts ===
* {{ill|lt=Camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (Meoto-gusu) - prefectural designated natural monument<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - Minamiizu Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in an exclave of the Nijō district, just north of the town library, north of the Kamo district that forms the center of Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified as one of the two seats of '''Kamo Shrine''' (かもじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Kamo no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was listed as a village shrine<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|lt=Tamakushihime|Q11572681|WD=Q11572681|lt=Mizokui-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Tamakushi-hime}}

=== Precincts ===
* {{ill|lt=Camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (Meoto-gusu) - prefectural designated natural monument<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - Minamiizu Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in an exclave of the Nijō district, just north of the town library, north of the Kamo district that forms the center of Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified as one of the two seats of '''Kamo Shrine''' (かもじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Kamo no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was listed as a village shrine<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|lt=Tamakushihime|Q11572681|WD=Q11572681|lt=Mizokui-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Tamakushi-hime}}

=== Precincts ===
* {{ill|lt=Camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (Meoto-gusu) - prefectural designated natural monument<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - Minamiizu Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in an exclave of the Nijō district, just north of the town library, north of the Kamo district that forms the center of Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified as one of the two seats of '''Kamo Shrine''' (かもじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Kamo no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was listed as a village shrine<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|lt=Tamakushihime|Q11572681|WD=Q11572681|lt=Mizokui-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Tamakushi-hime}}

=== Precincts ===
* {{ill|lt=Camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (Meoto-gusu) - prefectural designated natural monument<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - Minamiizu Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|qid=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|qid=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401110 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in an exclave of the Nijō district, just north of the town library, north of the Kamo district that forms the center of Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified as one of the two seats of '''Kamo Shrine''' (かもじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|qid=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Kamo no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima6_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140143-03.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|qid=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was listed as a village shrine<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|lt=Tamakushihime|Q11572681|qid=Q11572681|lt=Mizokui-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Tamakushi-hime}}

=== Precincts ===
* {{ill|lt=Camphor tree|Q158722|qid=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (Meoto-gusu) - prefectural designated natural monument<ref>[https://www.minami-izu.jp/?p=we-page-entry&spot=54149&cat=18735&pageno=3&type=list 三島神社 夫婦楠] - Minamiizu Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041890/1004982/1021295.html 三島神社のクスノキ] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.
